parser_claim: The runtime recognizes optional subject/modifiers plus one of 用, 喺, or 同, a coverb object/phrase, and a following predicate.
source_proposition: The implementation combines instrument, locative, comitative, addressee, and broader interpersonal relations under one learner wrapper.
implementation_effect: Split marker and semantic relation profiles while retaining the visible object and following predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the helper union or its three-marker inventory as one externally defined construction.

parser_claim: CoverbFrame reaches five non-held-out accepted trees, including locative and 同 speech/interpersonal examples.
exact_locator: non-held-out regression-snapshots.json; examples 我/佢喺屋企食飯, 我琴日喺屋企食飯, 我哋再同大家講講, and conditional expansion
source_proposition: The label has material accepted reach, but the fixtures cover only a subset of the runtime cross-product.
implementation_effect: Prioritize subtype narrowing without using fixtures as linguistic authority.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer productivity or naturalness from accepted test counts.

parser_claim: Cantonese coverbs are independently studied as a category with preposition-like function and verbal morphosyntax, but their category/attachment analysis is contested.
source_proposition: The article treats the coverb construction as serial-verb-like, reports experimental extraction contrasts, and argues that coverbs display verbal morphosyntax.
implementation_effect: Retain a theory-neutral surface relation rather than encoding preposition, verb, or adjunct-island status as settled.
forbidden_inference: Do not import the authors’ proposed syntax or generalize abstract-level findings to every runtime marker.

parser_claim: Preverbal instrumental 用 plus an instrument NP before the main VP is exactly attested.
exact_locator: pp. 1-2, example (2): ngo jung baa dou cit-zo go-go daangou
source_proposition: The instrument phrase precedes the main predicate and introduces an event participant distinct from the main object.
implementation_effect: Preserve marker, instrument object, and action object as separate visible relations.
forbidden_inference: Do not make the instrument NP the transitive object of the main action or license every 用 phrase as instrumental.

parser_claim: Preverbal 喺 location before a following VP is independently documented and distinct from a standalone locative predicate.
exact_locator: pp. 56-57: 佢喺泳池游水 versus 佢喺泳池
source_proposition: The source explicitly contrasts a 喺 phrase followed by a VP with the same locative phrase appearing alone.
implementation_effect: Keep coverb-frame status conditional on a following predicate; preserve the locative-predicate alternative.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every 喺 phrase as a CoverbFrame or every 喺度 as spatial.

parser_claim: Event-location 喺 phrases are dominantly preverbal, while postverbal location can express a different result relation.
source_proposition: The article distinguishes preverbal event-location placement from postverbal result-location profiles.
implementation_effect: Use position and predicate relation to separate coverb location from result location.
forbidden_inference: Do not turn a dominant order into an exceptionless parser rule or cover all locative constructions with this label.

parser_claim: 同 can introduce a true comitative phrase before the predicate.
source_proposition: The source glosses 同 as with/together with and notes that it can have other lexical functions in other contexts.
implementation_effect: Retain a comitative subtype when the event relation supports joint participation.
forbidden_inference: Do not identify every preverbal 同 NP as together-with solely from the marker.

parser_claim: The exact 同大家講講 sequence is pedagogically attested, while 同 also has跟/替-related uses; speech predicates do not prove literal co-participation.
exact_locator: printed pp. 106-107 and 297-298: 同 as 跟/替; 問下人然後同大家講講
source_proposition: The coursebook supplies exact addressee/interpersonal speech use and separately teaches multiple 同 relations.
implementation_effect: Keep addressee/interpersonal and comitative interpretations distinct and context-dependent.
forbidden_inference: Do not hard-code the relation from verb class alone or translate every 同 as with/together.

parser_claim: Temporal modifiers, coverb phrases, and reduplicated manner expressions have documented ordering and scope interactions.
source_proposition: The paper allows manner/coverb alternation in the inspected examples but places temporal material structurally higher and reports degraded reverse ordering.
implementation_effect: Preserve modifier identity and order rather than assigning all pre-coverb modifiers the generic manner role.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer free permutation of time, focus, manner, and coverb phrases or adopt the proposed tree as settled.

parser_claim: CoverbFrame has a supported surface family but must split by overt marker, semantic relation, and category/attachment uncertainty.
source_proposition: Instrument, event-location, comitative, addressee/interpersonal, and benefactive-like profiles are not one semantic slot despite similar order.
implementation_effect: Keep parser behavior frozen; future work should compose a relation-specific coverb phrase with the following predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the current three-marker cross-product or collapse all coverbs into ordinary prepositions or serial verbs.

parser_claim: The runtime builds one two-token DegreeMannerAdverbial from a broad degree/manner head plus 啲.
source_proposition: The note groups scalar property heads such as 貴/平 with action-manner heads such as 快/慢/大聲/小心.
implementation_effect: Split property comparison, imperative scalar adjustment, and action manner rather than assigning one generic meaning.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat a slot inventory as evidence that every listed or lexically similar head combines productively.

parser_claim: The label appears in three accepted trees as children of VerbComplementVP: 行快啲, 講大聲啲, and 講慢啲.
source_proposition: Accepted coverage is concentrated in directive/action contexts and does not exercise the full property-head inventory.
implementation_effect: Preserve the exact forms but narrow generalization beyond them.
forbidden_inference: Do not use inherited fixtures as independent grammar evidence.

parser_claim: 講大聲啲 is directly taught as a classroom directive.

implementation_effect: Source-link the exact form and directive function.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every sound/property noun can fill the head slot or that 啲 always means the same scalar operation.

parser_claim: 講慢啲 is directly taught as a classroom directive.

source_proposition: The exact sequence is used to request a slower action.
implementation_effect: Retain action-manner interpretation for the attested context.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a universal V + property + 啲 template from one teaching pair.

parser_claim: 行快啲 is explicitly given as “walk faster.”

implementation_effect: Preserve postverbal position and its relation to the action.
forbidden_inference: Do not silently reanalyze the form as the preposed DegreeMannerModifiedVP order.

parser_claim: 快啲 can precede a directional motion predicate in an imperative.
source_proposition: The exact form has 快啲 before 行上去 and scopes over a compound directional predicate.
implementation_effect: Distinguish the preposed modifier from postverbal 行快啲 and keep the directional VP intact.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer free pre/postposed alternation or identical information structure in every context.

parser_claim: 啲 also occurs with a property predicate in comparison rather than action manner.

source_proposition: The source treats 啲 as one comparison form and gives a subject-property example.
implementation_effect: Separate property/scalar comparison from manner modification of an event.
forbidden_inference: Do not gloss every X啲 as “how the action happens.”

parser_claim: A bare property plus 啲 can function as an imperative discourse unit.

forbidden_inference: Do not automatically attach every X啲 to the following VP across punctuation or intonational boundaries.

parser_claim: The inspected sources attest a bounded set of heads and several functions, not a free lexical cross-product.

implementation_effect: Require lexeme/form evidence or a better independently established schema before expanding head selection.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat missing examples as ungrammaticality or existing examples as universal productivity.

parser_claim: DegreeMannerAdverbial must split scalar property, directive adjustment, and event-manner functions with position and scope preserved.
source_proposition: The overt form X啲 is real, but its relation to a subject, event, following VP, or discourse command is not uniform.
implementation_effect: Keep behavior frozen; future representation should use composition and contextual scope rather than one generic “how phrase.”
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the broad head inventory or force one English gloss/function.

parser_claim: The runtime creates a transparent wrapper from a DegreeMannerAdverbial followed by a VP and optional particle.
